---
name: Bibliography Update
about: Add, remove, or update a citation in the scholarly bibliography
title: '[BIB] '
labels: bibliography
assignees: ''
---

## What kind of update

- [ ] Add a new citation
- [ ] Update an existing citation (new edition, corrected info, additional context)
- [ ] Remove a citation (retracted, discredited, no longer current)
- [ ] Re-frame an existing citation (audience tag, framing language)

## Citation

<!-- Full citation in APA-7 if possible. Include DOI or stable URL. -->

**Author(s):**
**Year:**
**Title:**
**Journal/Publisher:**
**DOI/URL:**

## Domain

<!-- Which reference file does this belong to?
- foundational-and-historical.md
- neurodiversity-and-affirming-scholarship.md
- diagnostic-and-assessment-research.md
- intervention-research.md
- sensory-and-cognitive.md
- co-occurring-and-mental-health.md
- lived-experience-and-qualitative.md
- policy-and-rights.md
- journals-and-databases.md
-->

## Audience tag

- [ ] [R/C] — Researcher / Clinician
- [ ] [Lay] — Informed lay reader
- [ ] [Both] — Reaches both audiences

## One-line framing

<!-- What does this source do? Why does it matter? What limitations apply? Keep it to one or two sentences. -->

## Why this update

<!-- For additions: why is this entry needed? What does it cover that the bibliography is missing?
For removals: why should this come out? Retracted? Superseded? Discredited?
For updates: what's changed?
-->

## Anything else

<!-- Optional. Conflicts of interest to disclose, your relationship to the work, etc. -->
